title: trifolium magnum
intro: Trifolium magnum, also known as Large White Clover, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Trifolium magnum include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as supporting the immune system and promoting wound healing. Trifolium magnum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
